prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mitsubishi 3B20T (660cc turbocharged inline-3 from the eK Space Custom RS) with a forged internals kit from Tomei, including billet crankshaft, forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), and H-beam connecting rods for 250+ hp reliability. Pair with a Garrett GT1549S turbocharger (custom-mapped for the 3B20T) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 1.5 bar peak pressure.

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power, featuring a 4-2-1 equal-length header (304-grade stainless) and a straight-pipe section with a 200-cell catalytic converter bypass (for track use only). Include a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tip with laser-etched Mitsubishi logo.

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (Mitsubishi eK X-specific valving) with 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates (Cusco Type RS), and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 63mm front control arm bushings). Pair with a Cusco 22mm front sway bar and a 18mm rear sway bar (eK X-specific fitment).
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (eK X-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser. Include custom 3D-printed side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Philips X-tremeUltinon gen2).

Voltex Type-5 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1200mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals (eK X-specific) with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees). Pair with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (eK X OEM replacement) featuring a 30mm vent and integrated NACA duct for intercooler airflow.

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (15x7 +38 offset) with Advan Neova AD09 tires (195/45R15). Paint wheels in Gunmetal with red lip accents. Include custom wheel spacers (5mm front, 10mm rear) from Buddy Club for flush fitment.
